title: Vancouver Street
description: Rainy mornings, late-afternoon light, quiet commuter geometry. Downtown Vancouver and the West End captured on foot, unposed, one frame at a time.

title: Coal Harbour Waterfront
description: Seawall studies, seaplane departures, cargo cranes at dusk. A slow portrait of the inner harbour across a single season.

title: Documentary Lagos
description: Open-air market studies, return-trip field work. Colour, shadow, texture, commerce. Framed with respect for subjects and scene.

title: Portraits
description: Commissioned and editorial portraits. Natural light, mid-frame, conversational.

title: Quiet Interiors
description: Domestic surfaces, hotel lobbies, architectural fragments. Found still lifes in places that were never meant to be photographed.

title: Craft Fieldwork
description: Tools, hands, process. Long-term project focused on makers and their working surfaces.
